final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit shift register with load and shift capabilities. When the load signal is asserted, the register captures the 16-bit input data (din) on the falling edge of the clock. When the shift signal is active, the register performs a right shift operation, shifting all bits to the right and introducing a one at the most significant bit position.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input load,
  input shift,
  input [15:0] din,
  output reg [15:0] dout
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
      dout <= din;
    end
    else if (shift) begin
      dout <= {dout[14:0], 1'b0};
    end
  end
  
endmodule

When the shift signal is active, the register performs a right shift operation, shifting all bits to the right and introducing a one at the most significant bit position.
